# GPU Drip - Graphics Card Price Tracker

GPU Drip tracks graphics card prices across major retailers including Amazon, Best Buy, Newegg, B&H, Micro Center, Adorama, Antonline, and CDW. Get real-time price comparisons, deal alerts, and stock availability for NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPUs.

## What We Do

- Track prices for 38+ GPUs across 8 retailers
- Send deal alerts when prices drop
- Compare prices side-by-side across retailers
- Show stock availability in real-time
- Share deals with unique URLs

## GPU Categories

- **NVIDIA RTX 50 Series**: RTX 5090, 5080
- **NVIDIA RTX 40 Series**: RTX 4090, 4080, 4070, 4060 variants
- **AMD RX 9000 Series**: RX 9070 XT, 9070
- **AMD RX 7000 Series**: RX 7900 XTX, 7900 XT, 7800 XT, 7600
- **AMD RX 6000 Series**: RX 6950 XT, 6900 XT, 6800 XT
- **Previous Generations**: RTX 3090, 3080, RX 6800, etc.

## Key Retailers

- Amazon
- Best Buy
- Newegg
- B&H Photo
- Micro Center (in-store deals)
- Adorama
- Antonline
- CDW (business/enterprise)

## Features

- Real-time price tracking
- Deal detection (lowest price highlighting)
- Stock availability alerts
- 6-column comparison view
- Shareable deal URLs
- Brand filtering (NVIDIA/AMD/Intel)
- VRAM filtering (8GB, 12GB, 16GB, 24GB+)
- Affiliate links to support the service

## Contact

Email: support@gpudrip.com
Twitter: @gpudrip

Last Updated: March 2026
